input.organisation_context: Catalogue RAG purchase flow. No category filter selected. No vendor filter selected.
success_factors: Select the strongest vendor for cloude system.
Use catalogue evidence and buyer priorities to define scoring criteria.

criteria.label: RAG Accuracy
criteria.description: Precision and relevance of retrieved context in generated responses.

criteria.label: Integration Capability
criteria.description: Ease of connecting with existing enterprise data sources and APIs.

criteria.label: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Recurring monthly or annual licensing fees.

criteria.label: TCO
criteria.description: Combined costs of implementation, maintenance, and usage over 3 years.

criteria.label: Security Compliance
criteria.description: Adherence to SOC2, ISO 27001, and enterprise-grade encryption standards.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Financial health and market longevity of the provider.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Ability to host and process data within specific geographic regions.

criteria.label: Strategic Fit
criteria.description: Alignment with long-term AI roadmap and enterprise architecture goals.
